title: Does Monday.com have the ability for a user to set their own preferences related to their “Workspace” view?
excerpt: I tried to locate this information in the help section but couldn’t seem to find anything.  Monday.com advised that they will forward to development team for possible future upgrade.

posts.author: Clu (Luke McCabe)
posts.cookedHtml: I tried to locate this information in the help section but couldn’t seem to find anything. Monday.com advised that they will forward to development team for possible future upgrade.
